display.purpose: Page H1 and hero headings only; weight 800.

lead.purpose: Opening paragraph under a heading; max ~58ch.

label.purpose: Tactical data and short markers; system mono, 0.8rem.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift for resting cards (light theme only).

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Form panels, mockups, emphasized cards (light theme only).

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus escaping the header (light theme only). No shadows in dark mode.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Standard ease-out for hovers, reveals and state transitions.

motion.name: micro
motion.purpose: Duration for micro-interactions (hover lift, border shift).

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrances; content is visible by default, JS only adds the entrance; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one hi-vis-filled action element. Navy ink on hi-vis; lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5em; background:#c9e837; color:#0b2740; font-weight:600; font-size:.98rem; padding:.82em 1.5em; border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#d6f04d; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #0e6285; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: hairline border, ink text, border shifts to steel on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5em; background:transparent; color:#0b2740; font-weight:600; font-size:.98rem; padding:.82em 1.5em; border:1px solid rgba(11,39,64,0.22); border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition: transform .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), border-color .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:#11769d; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #0e6285; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Text Link
components.description: Inline link: teal on light (never hi-vis), underline grows on hover.
components.css: .ds-textlink { color:#0e6285; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; border-bottom:1px solid transparent; transition:border-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-textlink:hover { border-bottom-color:#0e6285; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Resting content card: surface fill, 1px hairline, gentle hover lift.
components.html:
Plan the day in minutes.

Import orders and build optimized multi-stop routes, matched to vehicles and shifts.

Route planning
components.css: .ds-card { background:#ffffff; border:1px solid rgba(11,39,64,0.1); border-radius:12px; padding:28px; transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-title { color:#0b2740; font-weight:700; font-size:1.4rem; margin:0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { color:#3d5468; font-size:1rem; margin:0 0 20px; } .ds-textlink { color:#0e6285; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; }

components.name: Focal Tile
components.description: Signature bento emphasis panel: fixed navy in both themes, light text, hi-vis CTA link.
components.html:
Execute at the door.

Drivers run the route in the app: navigation, order details, then signature, photo and barcode capture at the door.

Driver app and ePOD →
components.css: .ds-focal { display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; gap:48px; background:#0b2740; border:1px solid rgba(242,246,249,0.1); border-radius:12px; padding:40px; text-decoration:none; } .ds-focal-title { color:#f2f6f9; font-weight:700; font-size:clamp(1.5rem,2.4vw,2rem); line-height:1.1; margin:0; } .ds-focal-body { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.82); font-size:1.02rem; margin:16px 0 0; max-width:38ch; } .ds-focal-cta { color:#c9e837; font-weight:600; transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-focal:hover .ds-focal-cta { transform:translateX(4px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field: surface fill, strong hairline, teal focus outline; 16px min to stop iOS zoom.
components.css: .ds-field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.45rem; } .ds-label { font-size:.9rem; font-weight:600; color:#0b2740; } .ds-input { background:#ffffff; border:1px solid rgba(11,39,64,0.22); border-radius:8px; padding:.72em .85em; color:#0b2740; font:inherit; font-size:1rem; width:100%; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #0e6285; outline-offset:1px; border-color:#0e6285; }

components.name: Pricing Toggle
components.description: Radiogroup toggle: selected pill filled hi-vis with navy ink, rest transparent.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display:inline-flex; border:1px solid rgba(11,39,64,0.22); border-radius:12px; padding:4px; } .ds-toggle-opt { border:none; background:transparent; color:#0b2740; font-weight:600; font-size:.95rem; padding:.5em 1.25em; border-radius:9px; cursor:pointer; } .ds-toggle-opt.ds-on { background:#c9e837; color:#0b2740; }

components.name: CTA Banner
components.description: One drenched moment per page: fixed navy band, light text, hi-vis primary button.
components.html:
Put your next route on MLogTech.

Free trial, no card required.
components.css: .ds-cta { background:#0b2740; text-align:center; padding:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6rem) 24px; } .ds-cta-title { color:#f2f6f9; font-weight:700; font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.4vw,2.75rem); margin:0 auto; max-width:24ch; } .ds-cta-note { color:#a9bdcb; margin:16px auto 32px; } .ds-btn-primary { background:#c9e837; color:#0b2740; font-weight:600; padding:.82em 1.5em; border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; }

narrative.overview: MLogTech is a delivery management platform for UK fleet operators, and its surface reads like the operation it runs: a calm navy ground with one loud, unmissable signal. Against a cool near-white by day and a deep charcoal-navy by night, ink and structure are navy and steel blue from the logo, and a single hi-vis yellow-green marks every point of action, the way a safety vest or a road marking is the one thing the eye is built to find. The system is deliberately sober and operational: it speaks the operator's language, states facts without superlatives, and rejects both the competitor's orange and the generic all-blue SaaS wash.
keyCharacteristics: One action color (hi-vis #c9e837), used only where the user should act.
Navy + steel identity pulled from the logo; no orange, ever.
Light theme is the default; dark theme is a true mirror, not an afterthought.
A single variable typeface (Archivo) plus system mono for tactical data.
Depth by hairline and tone, not by heavy shadow.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Hi-vis #c9e837 marks action and nothing else: buttons, the focal CTA, selected states. Never a link, heading or decorative wash. If hi-vis appears on something not clickable, it is a bug.

rules.name: The No-Orange Rule
rules.body: Orange is the competitor's color (Track-POD) and is forbidden anywhere. Warmth and urgency are carried by hi-vis and imagery, never orange.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Archivo carries the whole hierarchy; contrast comes from weight and size, not a second typeface. Only system mono is allowed, and only for tactical figures.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px hairline or a surface-tone shift before a shadow. Shadows are for things that float; in dark mode there are no shadows at all.

dos: Do spend hi-vis (#c9e837) only on action; keep it under a small fraction of any screen.
Do use navy (#0b2740) for ink and steel/teal for links; in dark mode links are steel (#4fa8cc), never hi-vis.
Do carry one typeface (Archivo) across the whole scale; use system mono only for tactical figures.
Do separate with hairlines and surface tone first; add shadow only for things that float, and never in dark mode.
Do keep fixed-dark bands and the focal tile literal navy in both themes.
Do keep inputs >=16px, body copy 65-75ch, and every text/background pair at WCAG AA (27/27 pairs pass).
Do number a section only when the order carries real information; parallel items get no numbers.
donts: Don't use orange anywhere; the No-Orange Rule is absolute.
Don't render hi-vis as text on a light surface (fails ~1.3:1), and don't let hi-vis land on non-interactive elements.
Don't introduce a second typeface for contrast; weight and size carry the hierarchy.
Don't stack identical card grids section after section; break the meter with a bento, an alternating row, or a single panel.
Don't scaffold with 01/02/03 eyebrows on parallel content; numbers are for genuine sequences only.
Don't rely on shadows for structure, and never ship shadows in dark mode.
Don't publish invented trust signals: no fabricated client logos, testimonials, or metrics.
